This document intentionally has no Markdown headings. It starts with a plain paragraph that includes **bold text**, *italic text*, and `inline code` to make sure inline syntax does not affect section splitting.

A second paragraph references release cadence, schema migration timing, and alert handling. None of this should create additional sections because there are still no heading markers.

Final paragraph: ingest pipelines often process messy prose documents, and this fixture simulates that shape without introducing structural markers.
